title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 10 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 10 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 10 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 10/04/2025
Today, The DCE iron ore futures opened higher in the morning and held up well. The most-traded contract I2509 finally closedat 707, with a daily increase of 3.06%. Traders' willingness to sell strengthened, while steel mills purchased as needed.
